commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region ${REGION} | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin ${ECR}

docker run -d --name aasmaa-backend --restart unless-stopped -p 8000:8000 -e AWS_REGION=us-east-1 -e BEDROCK_MODEL_ID=us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0 -e SECRET_KEY=temporary-demo-secret-key-change-in-production -e ENVIRONMENT=production -e DEMO_MODE=true -e DATABASE_ENABLED=false -e CHAT_HISTORY_ENABLED=false -e ENABLE_CUR_PARSING=false -e ATHENA_WORKGROUP=primary -e AWS_CUR_DATABASE=cost_and_usage_db -e AWS_CUR_TABLE=costandusagereport -e ATHENA_OUTPUT_LOCATION=s3://aasmaa-demo-data-152924644003/athena-results/ -e DEMO_ALLOWED_ACCOUNT_IDS=211125641885,773928629696 -e CORS_ORIGINS=https://demo.aasmaa.ai,http://demo.aasmaa.ai,http://localhost:3000 ${ECR}/aasmaa-backend:demo
